  • Contact

Privacy Policy

Effective Date: September 25, 2025

Contents 1. Information We Collect 2. How We Use Information 3. Cookies & Tracking 4. Third-Party Services & Links 5. Data Retention 6. Security 7. Your Rights 8. International Visitors 9. Changes to This Policy 10. Contact

1. Information We Collect

We do not collect personally identifiable information unless you voluntarily provide it (for example, by emailing us or clicking contact links). When you access the Site, we may automatically receive limited technical data to operate and secure the Site, such as:

  • IP address, device and browser type, operating system, and basic diagnostic data;
  • Pages viewed, referring/exit pages, timestamps, and similar usage information;
  • Aggregated analytics metrics used to understand site performance.

We do not sell or rent personal information.

2. How We Use Information

  • Operate, maintain, and improve the Site and its content;
  • Monitor security, prevent fraud, and diagnose issues;
  • Respond to inquiries that you initiate.

3. Cookies & Tracking

We may use cookies or similar technologies for basic functionality and analytics. You may disable cookies through your browser settings; doing so may affect certain features.

4. Third-Party Services & Links

The Site may link to third-party services (e.g., GitHub, LinkedIn) or embed external content. These services are governed by their own policies. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third parties.

5. Data Retention

We retain limited technical logs only for as long as necessary to maintain security and site performance, unless a longer retention period is required by law.

6. Security

We use reasonable technical and organizational measures appropriate for a small personal website. However, no method of transmission or storage is completely secure.

7. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete your personal data, restrict or object to processing, or request data portability. To exercise a right, contact us using the details below.

8. International Visitors

zrlo.dev is operated from the United States. If you access the Site from other regions with different laws, you acknowledge that your information may be processed in the U.S.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated version will be indicated by the “Effective Date” above.

10. Contact

For privacy-related questions or requests, email privacy@zrlo.dev.

© DULOUP. All rights reserved. Privacy Policy • Terms of Service
